title: Adams wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon
display_title: Adams wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon
wikitext:
[]: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by n2eva » Sat Jun 29, 2019 10:02 pm The sound effect used when Adam's "wings" spread during Second Impact is very similar to the sounds (electromagnetic vibrations from planetary environments turned into sound) of the dark side of the Moon and Saturn released years later. Clip from anime at 1:45 (please watch rest of clip in entirety for best example) https://youtu.be/okgwEK2Pa-g#t=1m45s Dark side of the Moon at :34 https://youtu.be/OxdkITPfu-8#t=0m34s Saturn at :35 (pretty much the whole thing, but this a good start point) https://youtu.be/Sh2-P8hG5-E#t=0m35s

[]: Re: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Sun Jun 30, 2019 8:19 pm I believe this has been touched on in earlier threads. I've worked stints as a sound designer in the last few years studying music, in my experience it's not uncommon at all to take sounds from places for no other reason than that they sound cool, in fact that's basically the field of sound design summed up. Certainly I think this particular sound is super cool (easily one of my favourites) and really captures the otherworldlyness of Adam (by extension the evas and angels), but beyond that I don't think there's much material in it for thematic discussion. Maybe it's a subtle nod to the existence of the FAR?

[]: Re: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by Idontknow » Sun Jun 30, 2019 9:01 pm https://youtu.be/wpKqsM9df-M 0:30 - Same sound effect? Don't tell me I am hearing this alone

[]: Re: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Mon Jul 01, 2019 3:05 pm Idontknow wrote: https://youtu.be/wpKqsM9df-M 0:30 - Same sound effect? Don't tell me I am hearing this alone

[]: Re: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Jul 01, 2019 3:19 pm Uh~ that's such a cool sound! Now I wonder, do I believe it sounds mega-spooky and otherworldly, because media conditioned me to feel that way by using this sound in otherworldly contexts? Or is it it the other way around?

[]: Re: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by felineki » Mon Jul 01, 2019 11:09 pm It's a stock sound effect, dating back to at least 1990: https://soundideas.sourceaudio.com/#!de ... d=11474413

[]: Re: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by Dan The Cat » Sun Jul 07, 2019 1:35 pm It sounds so cool!

[]: Re: Adam's wings spreading sound effect is the same as sounds of Saturn and the dark side of the Moon             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Sat Sep 14, 2019 5:01 am felineki wrote: It's a stock sound effect, dating back to at least 1990: https://soundideas.sourceaudio.com/#!de ... d=11474413
